name: Inspirational Quote Card
description: Features a motivational or insightful quote from a player, manager, or club legend. Designed to inspire engagement and shares.

quote.example: When you wear this shirt, you carry the weight of history and the hope of a city.

guidelines: Large quotation marks frame the text. The quote should be centered with generous line spacing. Use the player or person's cutout behind the text with a heavy overlay. Attribution below the quote in accent color. Keep quotes concise and impactful. Avoid controversial statements. Works well for pre-match motivation.
